briefdescription.para: This function is called by Chapter9 handler when class request is received from Host.

detaileddescription.para: This function is class request handler for composite device Setup packet received is for Class request(not a Standard Device request)

parameterdescription.para: is the setup packet received from Host.

briefdescription.para: This task implements audio record functionality.
This task implements audio playback functionality.
This file contains the implementation of the audio specific class code for the example.
